title: doc: AppState pub fields — cache-consistency invariant only stated for chat_display, not chats
description: AppState has all fields pub. The doc comment on chat_display (app.rs:29-35) warns 'Never mutate this field directly from outside apply_event'. But the parent invariant — that chats must ALSO only be mutated via apply_event to keep chat_display consistent — is not stated on chats itself. A contributor adding a refresh button and pushing to self.state.chats directly would corrupt the display cache without any compile-time guard. The invariant should be mirrored on the chats field doc.
